message:
fix: decoder K truncation and grpc client borrow-after-move

decoding.rs: plan.k (usize) was cast to u16 via `as u16` which silently
truncates if K > 65535. Changed to u16::try_from with unwrap_or(u16::MAX).

grpc/client.rs: GrpcClient::new() and with_codec() moved `channel` into
the struct field before borrowing it for client_framed_codec(), causing
a compile error (borrow of moved value). Fixed by computing the codec
before constructing the struct.

Also records batch 408 audits: 11 files (~14.6K lines) across messaging,
channels, sync primitives, and decoding. All channels/sync SOUND (no
lost wakeups found).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
